cloudfront.originrequestpolicy.headersco.Description: Determines whether any HTTP headers are included in requests that CloudFront sends to the origin. Valid values are:  +  `none` – HTTP headers are not included in requests that CloudFront sends to the origin. Even when this field is set to `none`, any headers that are listed in a `CachePolicy` *are* included in origin requests.+  `whitelist` – The HTTP headers that are listed in the `Headers` type are included in requests that CloudFront sends to the origin.+  `allViewer` – All HTTP headers in viewer requests are included in requests that CloudFront sends to the origin.+  `allViewerAndWhitelistCloudFront` – All HTTP headers in viewer requests and the additional CloudFront headers that are listed in the `Headers` type are included in requests that CloudFront sends to the origin. The additional headers are added by CloudFront.
Contains a list of HTTP header names.
